title: DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE NYSSA DENTAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary dental care services. 17 N 6th Street Nyssa, OR 97913 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Wednesday 8am-6:30pm Thursday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 372-2606 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 372-2606 FAX (541) 372-3855 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Walk-ins accepted. FEES: Accepts OHP, private insurance, and private pay. Offers sliding scale fee and discount to consumers with no insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Wednesday 8am-6:30pm Thursday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene General Dentistry Geriatric Dentistry Mobile Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
